word: G1881 - ἐπανίσταμαι - epanístamai - ep-an-is'-tam-ahee - Rise up against

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐπανίσταμαι

- Transliteration: Epanistamai

- Phonetic: ep-an-is'-tam-ahee

- Definition:

1. to cause to rise up against, to raise up against

- Origin: middle voice from G1909 and G450

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: Middle voice from G1909 and G450; to stand up on that is (figuratively) to attack: - rise up against.
